resources.string: Usage Access permission is required to track listening time across apps.
Shows today\'s ear health budget at a glance
WHO estimates 1.1 billion young people risk hearing loss from unsafe listening. EarGuard watches your daily exposure so you don\'t have to.
80 dB for 8 hours is the safe daily limit. Every 3 dB louder halves the safe time. EarGuard calculates your real exposure using volume-weighted minutes.
Hearing loss is permanent. EarGuard gives you a real-time Ear Health score so you can take breaks before you exceed your daily budget.
